meaning: n.造币,货币制度,创造,新造的字及其语等
examples: The city produced its own coinage from 1325 to 1864.
In 1783 he secured the adoption of the decimal coinage in Congress.
The "shadow banking system" is another PIMCO coinage.
Literary criticism became the coinage in which old family feuds were paid and repaid.
The Coinage (Measurement) Bill alters existing legislation to allow the production of 1kg coins.
